title: Online Consultation Fees
content: Online consultations with online doctors through the XCare hotline 1900 1234 are completely free of charge.

title: Offline Consultation and Treatment Fees
content: Offline physical consultations with a doctor cost from approximately $100 to $200 per visit. Endoscopy fees range from approximately $200 to $1000. General surgeries cost between approximately $1000 to $10000. All services, treatments, and medical packages can be paid for using either a credit card or cash (both online and offline).

title: Medical Package Pricing
content: XCare offers various medical packages including the Adolescent Package, Under30 Package, Middle Age Package, Senior Package, and Premium Package. All of these medical packages are priced the same at $1000.
